subcodes.title: Words to children and other visitors, spoken on 1913-04-27 in Stuttgart
subcodes.first_line: The love of the children is pure, therefore you can see it in their faces. All of us must have love, especially this love, because it is the Love of God. Our hearts must be like the hearts of the children
subcodes.first_line_orig: ببینید محبت اطفال چه قدر خالص است قلوبشان چگونه پاک است
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @love of God, @nearness and remoteness
